label: Embodied Robotics
title: Exoskeletons
description: Exoskeletons represent the frontier of human-robot integration. These assistive systems combine advances in robotics, sensing, and machine learning with lightweight hardware design. Our work spans the full stack—from electronics and mechanics to data-driven behavior modeling and intent prediction.

highlights.title: Addbiomechanics dataset: Capturing the physics of human motion at scale
highlights.description: AddBiomechanics is an open-source, cloud-based platform designed to automate the processing of motion capture data. By leveraging constrained optimization and machine learning, it streamlines the transition from raw trajectories to physics-consistent musculoskeletal simulations.
